$comment: PolyRig .polyrig/manifest.json template — audit chain, governed by schemas/manifest.schema.json. polyrig: fill every {{PLACEHOLDER}}; emit one selected_packs entry per selected pack (the single entry below is the shape to repeat); record any discovery-root collisions in overrides (keep [] when none). IMPORTANT: DELETE this entire $comment key when instantiating — the manifest schema sets additionalProperties:false and does not permit it. Field notes: generated_at is an RFC 3339 date-time (e.g. 2026-07-04T13:30:00Z); language records the interview language (interaction) and artifact language (artifacts, normally 'en'); per pack: source is builtin|user|project, last_reviewed is the YYYY-MM-DD date from the pack's pack.yaml, copied_to lists target-relative paths the knowledge was copied to, checksum is 'sha256:' + 64 lowercase hex chars of the copied content.
